news.title: FCC launches review of Disney broadcast licenses years ahead of schedule
news.summary: The Federal Communications Commission has told Disney to file its broadcast license renewals early, citing concerns around its DEI policies.

news.title: Starbucks raises full-year outlook after earnings, revenue top estimates
news.summary: Starbucks' global same-store sales, which only includes cafes open at least a year, increased 6.2%, fueled by more visits to its locations.

news.title: ABC faces renewed Trump backlash as Kimmel says comments 'not, by any stretch' call for violence
news.summary: While it's not the first time Kimmel has faced backlash over a show monologue, the renewed challenges now fall under freshly installed Disney CEO Josh D'Amaro.
